    ctld: correctly parse LUN size on 32-bit arches

    Disk offset values must always be 64-bit, not size_t.

    PR:             214874
    Submitted by:   pprocacci@gmail.com
    MFC after:      2 weeks
    Event:          January 2025 Bug-busting session
